reasoning: Your primary limiter is your 9.3% decline in power from 5-min to 20-min efforts, indicating poor lactate clearance and a need for improved fatigue resistance. Your last ride was at a controlled, lower intensity after an extended rest period, so we'll ease back into intensity with focus on sustained over-under intervals. This session directly prepares you for the continuous gradients of the Alpine Loop by targeting power builds and sustained efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5x 6-min over-unders: 2 min at 201-218W, 1 min at 242-256W, repeat. Focus on strong, controlled breathing to manage heart rate.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to flush out lactate

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
